title: Care Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Care Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
